description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable box magazine. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, giving the rifle a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features standard iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, both mounted on the barrel and receiver. The muzzle is equipped with a simple slant compensator or flash hider, typical of many military rifles. The trigger, magazine release, and safety selector are all visible and accessible on the right side of the receiver. The overall design is iconic, blending wood and metal elements for durability and functionality in urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a slant muzzle device.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The right side view displays the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, trigger, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver, with the barrel and magazine barely visible.
description_view_3: The left side view mirrors the right, showing the wooden stock, handguard, magazine, and the left profile of the receiver and sights.
